test.name: Add One Item To Cart

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens browser and goes to login page.

kw.name: Login With
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Logs in with the given username and password.

kw.name: Add Backpack To Cart
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Adds backpack and waits for state to update.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Add backpack — cart must have 1 item.

test.name: Add Two Items To Cart

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens browser and goes to login page.

kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Logs in with the given username and password.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Adds backpack and waits for state to update.

kw.name: Add Bike Light To Cart
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Adds bike light and waits for state to update.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Add backpack and bike light — cart must have 2 items.

test.name: Remove Item From Cart

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens browser and goes to login page.

kw.name: Add Backpack To Cart
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible

kw.name: Remove Backpack From Cart
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.
Removes backpack from cart page.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page does not contain element 'css:.cart_item'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is not found on the current page.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Add backpack, remove from cart — cart must be empty.

test.name: Cart Page Shows Added Items

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens browser and goes to login page.

Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Logs in with the given username and password.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To Cart
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Navigates directly to cart page.

kw.name: Verify Cart Has Items
Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Checks that at least one item is in the cart page.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Items added must appear on the cart page.

test.name: Complete Checkout Flow

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

Opens browser and goes to login page.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Logs in with the given username and password.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To Cart

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Navigates directly to cart page.

kw.name: Complete Checkout
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Htuu Will' into text field 'css:[data-test="firstName"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.msg: Location did not contain 'checkout-step-two' in 1 minute.
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location did not contain 'checkout-step-two' in 1 minute.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.
Fills checkout form and finishes order.
kw.status: Location did not contain 'checkout-step-two' in 1 minute.

kw.name: Verify Order Is Complete
kw.doc: Checks the order confirmation message.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Add item, checkout, finish — order must complete.
test.status: Location did not contain 'checkout-step-two' in 1 minute.

test.name: Valid Login Shows Products Page

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens browser and goes to login page.

kw.name: Login With
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Logs in with the given username and password.

kw.name: Verify Products Page Is Shown
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Checks that login succeeded and products page loaded.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Standard user logs in — products page must appear.

test.name: Locked Out User Cannot Login

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens browser and goes to login page.

kw.name: Login With
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Logs in with the given username and password.

kw.name: Verify Error Message Is Shown
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Checks that a login error message appeared.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Locked user must see an error, not get in.

test.name: Wrong Password Shows Error

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens browser and goes to login page.

Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Logs in with the given username and password.

kw.name: Verify Error Message Is Shown
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Checks that a login error message appeared.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Wrong password must show an error message.

test.name: Products Page Loads After Login

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens browser and goes to login page.

kw.name: Login With
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Logs in with the given username and password.

kw.name: Verify Products Page Is Shown
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Checks that login succeeded and products page loaded.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Products page title must say "Products" after login.

test.name: Sort Products Low To High

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens browser and goes to login page.

kw.name: Login With
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Logs in with the given username and password.

kw.name: Sort Products By
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'css:[data-test="product-sort-container"]' by value lohi.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.
Selects a sort option from the dropdown.

kw.name: Get First Product Name
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.
Returns the name of the first product shown.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Sort by price low-to-high — first item must be Sauce Labs Onesie ($7.99).

test.name: Sort Products High To Low

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Sort by price high-to-low — first item must be Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket.

test.name: Sort Products A To Z

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

Wait Until Element Is Visible

kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'css:[data-test="product-sort-container"]' by value az.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

Returns the name of the first product shown.

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Default sort A-Z — first item must be Sauce Labs Backpack.
